wikipedia.title: List of unsolved problems in physics
wikipedia.license_note: Problem titles and grouping follow the English Wikipedia list; HQIV status text is programme commentary, not Wikipedia content.

alignment_cores.name: curvature_norm_combinatorial
alignment_cores.desc: Combinatorial curvature norm N67 = 6^7 √3 from discrete null lattice (Lean OctonionicLightCone)

alignment_cores.name: derived_proton_mass_MeV
alignment_cores.desc: Proton mass anchor formally derived from Lean (DerivedNucleonMass + tuft etc)

alignment_cores.name: lapse_factor_ref_point
alignment_cores.desc: ADM lapse at canonical reference-like point (Lean HQVMetric / HQVM_lapse)

alignment_cores.name: omega_k_at_horizon_self
alignment_cores.desc: Ω_k(N;N) must be exactly 1 at the horizon (Lean theorem omega_k_at_horizon_self)

alignment_cores.name: omega_k_partial_at_reference
alignment_cores.desc: Ω_k at lock-in/reference shell relative to itself (Lean omega_k_lockin_calibration)

alignment_cores.name: reference_m
alignment_cores.desc: Lock-in shell index (qcdShell + lattice steps) — changing this is a major formal shift

alignment_cores.name: so8_dim
alignment_cores.desc: so(8) Lie closure dimension (Lean SO8Closure + triality + GeneratorsLieClosure)

phenomenology_metrics.name: alpha_GUT
phenomenology_metrics.desc: GUT coupling from Lean β-running engine (1/42 in paper)

phenomenology_metrics.name: available_modes_ref
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Combinatorial mode count at reference shell (Lean lattice)

phenomenology_metrics.name: bbn_eta10
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Baryon-to-photon ratio η × 10^10 at BBN/CMB from HQIV first-principles (dynamic shell integrator: curvature shells + vev + binding feedback + seed imprint over QCD-to-lock-in window). Paper script hqiv_dynamic_bulk_bbn.py gives ~6.19782 (not 6.10).
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream (ΛCDM): fitted parameter (Ω_b h^2) from BBN light-element abundances + CMB damping tail (depends on baryon density + several other cosmological parameters + initial conditions). HQIV: derived ~6.19782 from axioms + discrete dynamics (no fit).

phenomenology_metrics.name: cmb_birefringence_z
phenomenology_metrics.desc: CMB birefringence β (deg) at now from HQIV (α imprint + self-clock; paper script 0.379 deg). Python current 0.3 from witness. Agrees with obs within ~0.4σ per paper.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: predicts ~0 (no mechanism in standard inflation/GR) or new physics (axions, parity violation). HQIV predicts specific O(0.3-0.4)° from lattice monogamy α=3/5 and now conditions.

phenomenology_metrics.name: deuteron_binding_z
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Deuteron B from Lean spectraDeuteronBinding_MeV witness vs AME2020 (~0.75σ). Stale Arena getter used isotope_ladder uniform weights until pyhqiv fix lands.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: fitted from nucleon-nucleon potentials + ~dozens of parameters in chiral EFT / phenomenological models; not derived from deeper axioms

phenomenology_metrics.name: flatness_tuning_exponent
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Tuning exponent for initial curvature to produce observed near-flat universe today. HQIV dynamics from lattice gives natural small Omega_k(now) ~ paper value 0.0098 (agrees with Planck/bounds).
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream GR/ΛCDM (no inflation): |Ω_k| at t~t_Pl must be <~10^{-60} (or 10^{-30} at GUT) or universe not flat today; extreme fine-tuning of initial conditions. Inflation stretches but brings eternal inflation, measure problems.

phenomenology_metrics.name: free_neutron_half_life
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Free n lifetime (beta decay) from G_F^2 m_e^5 |M|^2 scaffold + ladder (isotope_ladder + hqiv_nuclear_spectra). Matches experiment to ~0.16% in current ladder (benchmark).
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: measured to high precision (UCN traps, beams); SM predicts via |V_ud| CKM element + nuclear matrix elements (depends on several measured inputs)

phenomenology_metrics.name: hierarchy_tuning_exponent
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Hierarchy tuning exponent: HQIV derives weak/Planck (and GUT) scale separation from lock-in m~4 + discrete counts without quadratic tuning. Matches paper derivations of m_p, alpha_GUT.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream (SM+GR): m_Higgs / M_Pl ~10^{-17}; quadratic divergences require ~10^{32} fine-tuning of bare parameters (or SUSY to ~TeV, or anthropics). No natural first-principles ratio from axioms.

phenomenology_metrics.name: omega_k_present_now
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Present-day Ω_k z-score vs |Ω_k|<0.02 Planck band (prediction ~0.0098). Not raw rel_err vs Planck central 0.001.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream (ΛCDM): Ω_k0 ≈ 0 (flat universe today); flatness problem — requires special initial conditions or inflation to explain why so close to zero (depends on early universe dynamics).

phenomenology_metrics.name: paper_comparisons_max_abs_z
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Max | (HQIV derived - exp) / published_1σ | across binding energies, half-lives, masses, BBN η, CMB etc. from the master paper-comparison suite. Core Arena 'sigma everywhere' driver.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: per-observable fits / effective theories achieve |z| << 1 on data they were calibrated to (many free params per sector)

phenomenology_metrics.name: proton_electron_mass_ratio
phenomenology_metrics.desc: m_p / m_e from HQIV resonance ladder + nucleon binding (tuft + SM_GR_Unification papers)
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: measured constant (CODATA/PDG fit to many experiments); no first-principles derivation in SM+GR

phenomenology_metrics.name: tuft_hopf_kappa6_correction
phenomenology_metrics.desc: TUFT Hopf κ₆ = η_paper × γ × C₂ (C2 = lapse conc at lock-in) for advanced mass/binding corrections in papers. Python now mirrors Lean.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream: no equivalent; fitted parameters per sector. HQIV: derived topological correction from Hopf/Beltrami bridge (kappa6, C2 terms).

phenomenology_metrics.name: vacuum_energy_discrepancy
phenomenology_metrics.desc: Vacuum energy density from finite sum ½ N(m) ω(m) over causal modes 0 to m_now (matches paper kirchhoff_finite_mode script). HQIV gives observed small value naturally.
phenomenology_metrics.mainstream_note: Mainstream QFT+GR (Planck cutoff): predicts ρ_vac ~10^{120} × observed (vacuum catastrophe); requires 120 orders fine-tuning or new physics (e.g. SUSY to 10^{-3} eV). No first-principles solution.

sigma_snapshot.note: Protected metrics are Lean↔Python exact witnesses (rel_err = 0). Phenomenology uses published error bars; deuteron/Ω_k(now) patched to Lean witness + Planck band until pyhqiv main Arena metrics merge.

status_legend.addressed: Core mechanism closed in Lean (Arena may still polish σ on specific observables).
status_legend.partial: Mechanism in spine — named fit-out remains; see blockers field.
status_legend.reinterpreted: Problem reframed; spine covers the new story's algebra, numerics may lag.
status_legend.open: No dedicated spine module yet — design work needed.

problems.title: Theory of everything
problems.hqiv: Unified discrete action, holonomy discharge, and SM anomaly cancellation in Lean — tier-III patch dictionary still fit-out.
problems.in_spine: One discrete action cell (O–Maxwell + gravity on shared φ); S_HQIV⇒L_SM bridge; three-generation SM anomaly-free (AnomalyCancellation); cyclic Stokes + SO(8) plaquette holonomy (ActionHolonomyGlue, SO8PlaquetteHolonomy, TuftSynthesisZetaHolonomyDischarge, WilsonLoop).
problems.remaining: Tier-III cross-patch dictionary for arbitrary observables; full continuum limit matching every standard QFT calculation workflow; Haar/measure normalization on rotated charts (NonAbelianHolonomyMeasureScaffold — explicit open frontier, not missing holonomy proofs).
problems.blockers: None known — the Lagrangian exists in the discrete spine; remaining work is dictionary and fit-out, not missing action postulates.

problems.title: Quantum gravity (GR + QM consistency)
problems.hqiv: GR+QM consistency on a finite causal carrier — graviton QFT kept as comparison layer.
problems.in_spine: Locally finite causal order, finite Born/measurement ledgers, horizon-limited QFT closure, Ω_k(N;N)=1 at the horizon.
problems.remaining: Continuum graviton S-matrix baseline; exhaustive map of every GR clock into HQVM.
problems.blockers: None known — ontology is patch-first by design, not stuck on a hidden inconsistency.

problems.title: Black hole information paradox
problems.hqiv: Soft-firewall bookkeeping on the auxiliary channel — Page-curve theorem still to build.
problems.in_spine: Finite measurement layer with auxiliary transfer; horizon energy closure lemmas.
problems.remaining: Explicit black-hole patch geometry; proved information release / Page curve in Lean.
problems.blockers: Dedicated BH thermodynamics module not yet in the spine — engineering gap, not a claimed paradox resolution.

problems.title: Problem of time
problems.hqiv: Multiple physical clocks are first-class; lapse/age ratio is proved, absolute Gyr values are readouts.
problems.in_spine: Shell-indexed rapidity, ADM lapse compression, UniverseAge ratio algebra, Now slice selection.
problems.remaining: Spell out every GR coordinate-time choice in the variational layer; tie complex-time Stokes bridge to all sectors.
problems.blockers: None known — documentation and chart glue, not a conceptual deadlock.

problems.title: Interpretation of quantum mechanics
problems.hqiv: Pilot-wave style: Born rule from a finite measurement layer — not many-worlds.
problems.in_spine: Born norms, collapse rules, and aux-channel transfer proved on finite patches (BornMeasurementFinite).
problems.remaining: Full apparatus map for every experimental setup; community acceptance of the interpretation frame.
problems.blockers: None known in the formal layer — this is a reframing, not a half-built proof.

problems.title: Arrow of time
problems.hqiv: Thermodynamic arrow from shell opening — certified Lyapunov relaxation, no extra postulate.
problems.in_spine: Causal order forbids closed loops; entropy production ≥0 on finite patches; shell-opening Lyapunov certificate.
problems.remaining: Arena cross-checks on specific cosmological initial slices (σ metrics only).
problems.blockers: None known.

problems.title: Yang–Mills existence and mass gap
problems.hqiv: Millennium analytic QFT — outside patch mandate; discrete confinement is the HQIV route.
problems.in_spine: DiscreteYMConfinement documents scope; colour binding on the hadron spine is separate.
problems.remaining: Clay-problem mass-gap proof in continuum Yang–Mills.
problems.blockers: Programme choice — not targeted.

problems.title: Dark energy / cosmic acceleration
problems.hqiv: Acceleration from G_eff(φ)=φ^(3/5) + lapse — coincidence problem is fit-out, not missing physics.
problems.in_spine: Modified Friedmann sector with G_eff(φ); lapse dragging tied to the same φ as gauge (GRFromMaxwell).
problems.remaining: Uniqueness proof for why we sit on the accelerating hypersurface today; CLASS/HiCLASS pipeline sign-off.
problems.blockers: None known — need simulation + σ reduction, not a new constant.

problems.title: Dark matter
problems.hqiv: No new stable particle — galactic curves from horizon-modified inertia.
problems.in_spine: Modified-inertia algebra on HQIVFluidClosureScaffold; no dark-matter particle sector required.
problems.remaining: SPARC/flyby residuals driven down in Arena; lensing and cluster tests at σ.
problems.blockers: None known for the reinterpretation — risk is phenomenology fit, not internal inconsistency.

problems.title: Matter–antimatter asymmetry
problems.hqiv: BBN η ~6.20 from dynamics (Arena ~1.6% off PDG) — geometry proved, last digits are fit-out.
problems.in_spine: Ω_k lock-in geometry, shell integrator structure, triality CP scaffold (BaryogenesisCore).
problems.remaining: Push η from calibrated witness to pure theorem; tighten bbn_eta10 σ in Arena.
problems.blockers: None known — η is tracked numerically, not hand-fitted as an independent ΛCDM knob.

problems.title: Hubble tension
problems.hqiv: Wall-clock vs apparent age split is in spine — explicit H₀ pipeline comparison is fit-out.
problems.in_spine: UniverseAge lapse ratio (51.2 Gyr wall vs 13.8 Gyr appearance); shell ladder for distance–redshift.
problems.remaining: End-to-end H₀ comparison vs Planck + local ladders with published error bars in Arena.
problems.blockers: None known — mechanism is specified; missing piece is the published comparison table.

problems.title: Horizon / homogeneity problem
problems.hqiv: The temperature/shell ladder is the homogeneity engine — fast harmonic steps post–big bang, not a separate inflaton field.
problems.in_spine: Shell-opening convergence and horizon monogamy (ShellOpeningEvolution); auxiliary temperature ladder T(m) and harmonic shell steps supply the inflationary role — discrete null-shell growth accelerates after lock-in (CosmologicalShellLadder, HorizonBlackbodyLadder, HarmonicLadderMass).
problems.remaining: Extend HiCLASS / hqiv-class to propagate the discrete quadratic growth paradigm through CMB perturbations and large-scale isotropy — simulation fit-out, not a missing inflaton postulate in Lean.
problems.blockers: None known — spine specifies the ladder; HiCLASS build-out is engineering.

problems.title: Three generations of quarks and leptons
problems.hqiv: Three generations from Spin(8) triality — CKM/Yukawa digits still fit-out.
problems.in_spine: Three representation labels and order-3 cycle certified (Triality); mass ladder hooks.
problems.remaining: Full measured CKM/PMNS matrices from LadderMixingHierarchy (module states this explicitly).
problems.blockers: None known — mixing magnitudes are the remaining derivation, not a missing generation count.

problems.title: Hierarchy problem (gravity vs other forces)
problems.hqiv: No quadratic tuning knob — G_eff(φ) and lock-in readouts; hierarchy_tuning_exponent=0 in Arena.
problems.in_spine: G_eff(φ)=φ^(3/5); electroweak/GUT scales from lock-in shell + lattice counts; α_GUT=1/42.
problems.remaining: Continuum proof matching every SM renormalisation scheme; uniqueness vs anthropics.
problems.blockers: None known for the no-tuning-exponent witness — not claiming SUSY stabilization proofs.

problems.title: Color confinement
problems.hqiv: Confinement without propagating gluons — trapped Casimir on strong octonion channels (gluon artifact paper).
problems.in_spine: Gluon-as-curvature-artifact closure: strong binding = inner–outer Casimir trapping on channels {4,5,6,7}, one unified curvature-log kernel (GluonCurvatureArtifact); proton/hadron network binding and SU(3) chart Lie certificates (StrongColorSu3ChartClosure). HEP decay readout discharges strong-sector widths and OZI slots.
problems.remaining: Excited-hadron spectrum polish in Arena; optional continuum Wilson-loop comparison layer (not the programme ontology).
problems.blockers: None known — confinement is the trapped-Casimir readout, not a missing proof.

problems.title: Strong CP problem / axions
problems.hqiv: No independent gluon DOF → no fitted θ_QCD; CP-odd holonomy from Fano ledger (HEP decay + CPHolonomyPhase).
problems.in_spine: Strong sector has no propagating gluon field in the proved action (GluonCurvatureArtifact) — the usual θ_QCD knob is absent by ontology. CP violation enters as oriented Fano holonomy skew (cpOddFanoHolonomySkew in HepDecayReadout; CPHolonomyPhase Jarlskog/holonomy layer).
problems.remaining: Full 3×3 CKM from Fano overlaps (CPHolonomyPhase lists this as open); mainstream θ_QCD comparison wording for external reviewers; extend HEP anomaly discharge panel σ.
problems.blockers: None known — strong-CP smallness is structural (no gluon field), not an axion fit-out.

problems.title: Neutrino masses and hierarchy
problems.hqiv: Mixing angles and ordering in spine — absolute Σm_ν scale and Majorana/Dirac choice open.
problems.in_spine: Curvature suppression ladder, Fano-plane mixing (θ=π/4, δ=π/5), ordering lemmas.
problems.remaining: NeutrinoAbsoluteScale closure; PDG Σm_ν comparison in Arena.
problems.blockers: None known — scale sector is the named open module, not a hidden conflict.

problems.title: Muon anomalous magnetic moment (g − 2)
problems.hqiv: Leading TUFT spurion in spine (~4–5% high vs experiment) — subleading terms are fit-out.
problems.in_spine: tuftAnomalousMomentSpurion: a_ℓ from exp(n α_em/6) Beltrami winding (HopfShellBeltramiMassBridge).
problems.remaining: Subleading zeta-determinant terms; full FNAL/CODATA closure in paper_comparisons_max_abs_z.
problems.blockers: None known — leading term is derived; gap is higher-order arithmetic.

problems.title: Galaxy rotation curves
problems.hqiv: Inertia-screening formula in spine — SPARC catalog match is Arena fit-out.
problems.in_spine: Horizon-modified inertia scaffold (HQIVFluidClosureScaffold).
problems.remaining: Drive orbital_flyby_sparc_model_residual down across SPARC galaxies.
problems.blockers: None known — physics route chosen; missing piece is numerical agreement.

problems.title: Flyby anomaly
problems.hqiv: Scaffold records the screening law — Anderson et al. trajectory match not claimed yet.
problems.in_spine: OrbitalFlybyScaffold inertia-screening algebra.
problems.remaining: Integrated flyby trajectories vs published residuals; dynamic corrections in Arena.
problems.blockers: None known — module header states trajectory match is not yet claimed.

problems.title: Cosmic birefringence / large-scale polarization
problems.hqiv: β=α·log traversal proved in Lean — Planck ~0.4σ is Arena fit-out, not yet a Lean theorem.
problems.in_spine: α=3/5 imprint; cumulative shell traversal (CMBBirefringenceFirstPrinciples).
problems.remaining: Formalise Planck DR4 comparison in Lean; tighten cmb_birefringence_z in Arena.
problems.blockers: None known — mechanism predicts O(0.3–0.4)°; σ gap is witness calibration.

problems.title: Proton stability and spin crisis
problems.hqiv: Proton mass + stability channel in spine — spin decomposition and GUT decay not closed.
problems.in_spine: Proton anchor at referenceM; colour-singlet antisymmetric channel cost (DerivedNucleonMass).
problems.remaining: Spin crisis ledger on 8×8 composites; GUT-scale decay lifetime (not predicted).
problems.blockers: None known for stability/mass — spin content is the open formalisation.

problems.title: Nuclear force and binding energies
problems.hqiv: Deuteron B from Lean spectraDeuteronBinding_MeV — ~0.75σ vs AME2020; A≤4 binding spine closed in Lean.
problems.in_spine: 8×8 E_bind through light isotopes; neutron β width; tritium τ on B_curv(ξ) ledgers.
problems.remaining: Heavier-nuclei isotope ladder (A>4) and dynamic curvature-binding extensions.
problems.blockers: None known for the A≤4 theorem pack.

problems.hqiv: Not on the horizon-lattice programme roadmap.
problems.in_spine: Chemistry spine exists separately; not wired to HTSC.
problems.remaining: Any condensed-matter mechanism.

problems.title: Navier–Stokes existence and smoothness
problems.hqiv: Clay millennium problem — HQIV fluid scaffold is not an existence proof.
problems.in_spine: HQIVFluidClosureScaffold toward fluid charts only.
problems.remaining: Navier–Stokes existence and smoothness.

problems.title: Abiogenesis
problems.hqiv: Origin of life is outside the physics patch.
problems.in_spine: Peptide folding is chemistry fit-out, not abiogenesis.
problems.remaining: Prebiotic chemistry narrative.
problems.blockers: Programme choice — not targeted.

problems.title: Cosmological constant / vacuum energy problem
problems.hqiv: Finite-mode vacuum sum gives small ρ_vac naturally — not every QFT cutoff scheme closed in Lean yet.
problems.in_spine: Mode counting on the null lattice; finite Kirchhoff sum ½N(m)ω(m) to m_now; vacuum_energy_discrepancy=0 in Arena witness.
problems.remaining: Theorem matching every mainstream QFT vacuum estimate; full renormalisation dictionary.
problems.blockers: None known for the finite-sum mechanism — remaining work is comparison proofs, not a failed cancellation.

problems.title: Flatness problem / initial conditions for Ω_k
problems.hqiv: Ω_k(now)~0.0098 within |Ω_k|<0.02 Planck band (Arena z≈0.44); flatness_tuning_exponent=0.
problems.in_spine: Lattice curvature + Friedmann packaging; dynamic Ω_k(now) readout without 10^60 initial tuning.
problems.remaining: Prove initial-condition independence in Lean; optional tighten vs Planck central 0.001.
problems.blockers: None known for the no-fine-tuning claim — present slice is inside observational band.

lean_audit.note: Honest programme map: each card lists what the Lean spine already discharges, what fit-out remains, and whether we know of a conceptual blocker. 'Partial' means mechanism in spine with specific remaining work — not a vague hedge.

lean_evidence_legend.theorem_pack: 0-sorry Lean module(s) for the core mechanism.
lean_evidence_legend.calibrated_witness: Geometry proved; a key magnitude still uses paper/PDG calibration.
lean_evidence_legend.scaffold: Algebra in spine — trajectories and catalog fits are fit-out.

copy_legend.in_spine: What hqiv-lean already certifies or the paper chain discharges.
copy_legend.remaining: Specific treatment still missing — numerics, theorems, or comparisons.
copy_legend.blockers: Known conceptual blockers; 'None known' means fit-out/engineering only.
